response.original_title: Why can't I cash out my money in Robinhood? ✪ Help Desk ✪
response.overview: You can’t cash out on Robinhood  when your funds are still in the settlement period .(1)⇢(888)⇢(576)⇢(2041)  After selling stocks or crypto, it usually takes 1–5 business days for money to become withdrawable. Until then, it stays as unsettled funds .「(1)➤(888)✧(576)✧(2041)」  Always check(1)⇢(888)⇢(576)⇢(2041)  “Withdrawable Cash” before trying to transfer.
response.title: Why can't I cash out my money in Robinhood? ✪ Help Desk ✪
